subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, thy letter was received and perused with the utmost care. It was not submerged in the ocean of papers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما رسید بکمال دقت ملاحظه گردید غریق بحر اوراق نشد و شدت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
